SELECT toInt8(-8) AS negative_int, toInt8(127) AS max_int, toInt8(128) AS overflow_int FROM test_table;
SELECT toInt8(num), num FROM (SELECT num FROM test_table WHERE num != '128') AS subquery;
SELECT a.num, toInt8(a.num) FROM (SELECT num FROM test_table WHERE toInt8(num) IS NOT NULL) AS a;
SELECT toInt8(num) FROM (SELECT num FROM test_table WHERE num LIKE '%-%') AS subquery;

SELECT a.num, b.num, toInt8(a.num) + toInt8(b.num) AS addition_result FROM (SELECT num FROM test_table WHERE num IN ('127', '-8')) AS a JOIN (SELECT num FROM test_table WHERE num IN ('-8', '8')) AS b;
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT toInt8(num) FROM test_table WHERE num NOT LIKE '%Inf%') AS valid_inputs;
